page_subtitle: Manage podcast subscriptions and episode feeds.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to Podcast
subscribe.subtitle: Add a podcast feed to your library.
subscribe.feed_url_hint: The RSS or Atom feed URL for the podcast.
subscribe.series_hint: Link this podcast to an existing series.
subscribe.auto_fetch_hint: Automatically check for new episodes on a schedule.
subscribe.auto_sanitize_hint: Automatically remove ads from new episodes (coming soon).
subscribe.fetch_interval_hint: How often to check for new episodes (1–10,080).
subscribe.success_message: Podcast subscription created. Episodes will be fetched shortly.

detail.no_episodes: No episodes found for this podcast.

settings.title: Podcast Settings
settings.rss_feed_description: Use this URL to listen to this podcast in your favorite player. This URL contains a private token; do not share it.
settings.rotate_token_hint: Generates a new token. The current token will remain valid for 7 days.
settings.revoke_token_hint: Immediately invalidates all existing tokens. You will need to update your podcast player.
settings.unsubscribe_confirm: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe? This will remove the podcast and all its episodes from your library.
settings.audible_description: Connect your Audible account to import audiobooks and podcasts directly into Shelf.

audible.connect_subtitle: Sign in with your Amazon account to authorize Shelf.
audible.login_instruction: Click the button below to open the Amazon login page. Once finished, you will be redirected back to Shelf.
audible.finalize_error: Failed to complete Audible authentication. Please try again.
audible.browse_subtitle: Select titles to import as private RSS feeds.
audible.import_modal_description: Configure how this title should be served in your RSS feed.
audible.empty_library: No titles found in your Audible library.
